section Section1;
shared Server = "cc-bi-sql-prod-external-001-biadapter.database.windows.net" meta [IsParameterQuery = true, IsParameterQueryRequired = true, Type = type text];
shared Database = "CC-BI-SQLDB-PROD-AQUATIQ_AS" meta [IsParameterQuery = true, IsParameterQueryRequired = true, Type = type text];
shared StartDate = Date.StartOfYear(Date.AddYears(Date.From(DateTimeZone.UtcNow()), -1)) meta [IsParameterQuery = true, IsParameterQueryRequired = true, Type = type date];
shared Country = "NOR" meta [IsParameterQuery = true, IsParameterQueryRequired = true, Type = type text, List = {"NOR", "SWE", "DNK"}, DefaultValue = "NOR"];
shared #"SQL Database Overview" = let
    //Get list of queries
    Queries = #sections,
    QueryNames = List.Transform(Record.FieldNames(Queries[Section1]), each Text.Replace(Text.Replace(_, "dim",""),"fct","")),
    //Get tables in SQL database
    Source = Sql.Database(Server, Database),
    //Filter out _tmp tables
    #"Filtered rows" = Table.SelectRows(Source, each not Text.Contains([Name], "_tmp")),
    //Lookup SQL table names in the list of queries and return the ones that are missing
    #"Added custom" = Table.AddColumn(#"Filtered rows", "LookupTable", each List.Contains(QueryNames, [Name]), Logical.Type),
    #"Filtered rows 1" = Table.SelectRows(#"Added custom", each ([LookupTable] = false))
in
    #"Filtered rows 1";
shared Template = let
    //FUNCTION ----------
    _fxInsertBlankRow = (_Table as table) =>
    let
    ColumnNames = Table.ColumnNames(_Table),
    // Creating a new row with -1 for numeric columns and "N/A" for text columns
    NewRow = List.Transform(ColumnNames, (cn) =>
    let
    FirstRowRecord = Table.FirstN(_Table, 1){0},
    FirstRowValue = Record.FieldOrDefault(FirstRowRecord, cn),
    ColumnType = Value.Type(FirstRowValue)
in
    if Type.Is(ColumnType, type number) then -1
    else if Type.Is(ColumnType, type text) then "N/A"
    else null),
    // Converting the list to a record
    NewRowRecord = Record.FromList(NewRow, ColumnNames),
    AddedRow = Table.InsertRows(_Table, Table.RowCount(_Table), {NewRowRecord})
in
    AddedRow,
    //Source and Navigation
    Source = Sql.Database(Server, Database),
    Navigation = Source{[Schema = "dbo", Item = "Branch"]}[Data],
    //Remove Unused Columns - This will reduce the model size
    _RemoveUnusedColumns = Table.RemoveColumns(Navigation, List.Intersect({ Table.ColumnNames(Navigation), UnusedColumns })),
    //Insert blank row
    _InsertBlankRow = _fxInsertBlankRow(_RemoveUnusedColumns),
    //TRANSFORMATIONS ----------
    //Insert Columns
    _InsertStandardColumns =
    Table.ExpandRecordColumn(
    Table.AddColumn(
    _InsertBlankRow,
    "Columns",
    each
    [
    FK BranchID = Text.Combine({ Text.From([CompanyID]), Text.From([BranchId]) }, "-")
    ]
    ),
    "Columns", {"FK BranchID"}, {"FK BranchID"}
    ),
    _InsertCustomColumns =
    Table.AddColumn(
    _InsertStandardColumns,
    "Columns",
    each
    [
    PK 000 = Text.Combine({ [#"FK BranchID"] }, "-"),
    FK 001 = Text.Combine({ [#"FK BranchID"] }, "-"),
    FK 002 = Text.Combine({ [#"FK BranchID"] }, "-")
    ]
    ),
    _ExpandCustomColumns =
    Table.ExpandRecordColumn(_InsertCustomColumns, "Columns", Record.FieldNames(_InsertCustomColumns[Columns]{0}), Record.FieldNames(_InsertCustomColumns[Columns]{0})),
    //Change Types On All Custom Columns to Text
    _ListOfCustomColumns = List.Combine({ {"FK BranchID"}, Record.FieldNames(_InsertCustomColumns[Columns]{0}) }),
    _ChangeTypes =
    Table.TransformColumnTypes(
    _ExpandCustomColumns,
    List.Zip({ _ListOfCustomColumns, List.Repeat({type text}, List.Count(_ListOfCustomColumns)) })
    ),
    //Remove blank row inserted earlier
    _RemoveDummyRows = Table.SelectRows(_ChangeTypes, each [FK BranchID] <> "-1--1"),
    //Dynamically find the PK column(s) and mark as key
    _FindPKColumn = List.FindText(Table.ColumnNames(_RemoveDummyRows), "PK "),
    _AddKey = Table.AddKey(_RemoveDummyRows, _FindPKColumn, false),
    _RemoveDuplicates = if List.IsEmpty(_FindPKColumn) then _AddKey else Table.Distinct(_AddKey, _FindPKColumn)
in
    _RemoveDuplicates;

in
    ChangedColumnTypes;
